success_patterns: Existing stub code provides excellent guidance
Comprehensive test suites (38+ tests) ensure quality
Phased approach works well for complex features with dependencies
Property-based tests provide excellent coverage with minimal code
fast-check constraints need careful handling (Math.fround, noNaN)
Completing dependencies first unblocks deferred work efficiently
Test setup must match actual formulas for accurate validation
Comprehensive validation prevents edge cases in stat allocation
Account for Math.floor/ceil rounding in property tests with floating point
Property tests provide 1000+ test cases with minimal code

Test coverage calculation - handled with proper mocking
Missing types in stub - added to combat.types.ts
Unused variables in tests - removed to fix compilation
Outdated property tests - rewrote to match current API
Missing Skill properties - added required fields
TypeScript implicit any types - added explicit annotations
fast-check NaN generation - added noNaN constraint
Missing return statements - added explicit returns
improvements_identified: Add integration tests with actual entities
Test for unused variables before running tests
Document property testing patterns for team
Always use noNaN for float generators
